about_title: Awn Platform – Smart Solutions for Car Services
about_desc: "Awn" is a Saudi app under development, aimed at simplifying access to car services through a unified platform connecting service providers and customers in one place. We work to enable workshops and centers to have a digital presence, receive requests efficiently, and expand their customer base without marketing costs.
